error_signature: no results returned from PostgreSQL query
title: PostgreSQL Lookup returns no results with expression
symptom: The PostgreSQL Lookup node returns no results when using an expression for the chat_id, despite the value being correct. Hardcoding the value works as expected.
not_this_if: Hardcoding the chat_id directly returns results
root_cause: The issue arises from how n8n processes expressions in SQL queries. When using an expression, it may not resolve the parameter correctly, leading to no results being returned even though the value is valid.
fix_steps: Use the 'Select a row from the table' operation instead of 'Execute SQL'
Configure the node to retrieve the row based on the chat_id directly
agent_instruction: Switch to using the 'Select a row from the table' operation for retrieving the chat_id.
